description: On quick task entry make the model button bring up a modal for model selection
summary: Successfully converted QuickEntryBox model selection from inline dropdown to modal dialog. Created ModelSelectionModal.tsx with proper modal pattern (overlay, header, close button, Escape key handling), integrated it with QuickEntryBox, and added comprehensive tests (18 for ModelSelectionModal, 59 for QuickEntryBox). All 77 tests pass. The modal follows existing patterns from SubtaskBreakdownModal and PlanningModeModal, using consistent CSS classes (modal-overlay, modal, modal-header, modal-close).

log.outcome: The specification is well-structured, accurate, and ready for implementation. The mission is clear, file references are correct, steps have verifiable outcomes, and testing requirements are comprehensive. The sizing as a small (S) task with review level 0 is appropriate for this focused UI pattern replacement.

log.action: Step 1 (Update QuickEntryBox to Use Modal) → in-progress
Created ModelSelectionModal component following SubtaskBreakdownModal pattern
log.outcome: Component includes modal-overlay, modal, modal-header CSS classes, Close button, Escape key handling, CustomModelDropdown reuse, loading/error states, model badges

log.action: Step 1 (Update QuickEntryBox to Use Modal) → done
Test files created and updated - ModelSelectionModal.test.tsx (new, 18 tests) and QuickEntryBox.test.tsx (modified, 59 tests). All 77 tests pass.
log.outcome: Testing complete for model selection modal
